snapshot.title: Write loading and splash screen copy
snapshot.description: The loading/splash screen is the first thing players see. Write copy for: app name treatment, tagline, and any loading state message. Should establish tone immediately.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Tagline and app name treatment written

oldValue.text: Tagline and app name treatment written

newValue.text: Tagline and app name treatment written

changes.newValue:
kanban: 7eqy6z

## Splash / loading screen copy

**App name treatment**
Saily — no tagline suffix needed, stands alone.

**Tagline (below name)**
"Real science. One mission a day."

**Loading micro-copy (6 rotating lines)**
1. "Calibrating transit scanner…"
2. "Pulling Sol data from Mars…"
3. "Checking the asteroid field…"
4. "Updating the chart…"
5. "Your character is waiting at the briefing console."
6. "One signal to find. No rush."

**Tone note:** Quiet, slightly procedural — feels like the start of a real mission rather than an app loading. No exclamation marks.
